source_basis: Fixture case dossier; no real case source base reviewed.
what_i_can_verify: The artifact follows the shared book artifact schema.
what_remains_uncertain: Real case use requires source base, comparison class, selection logic, and counter-case review.
user_verification_needed: Verify case facts, case-selection rationale, and generalization limits before using the case.

process_passport.source_basis: Fixture case dossier; no real case source base reviewed.
process_passport.source_access_level: fixture only; no live source access verified
process_passport.corpus_coverage: Fixture artifact only; no corpus coverage or representativeness was verified.
tool_use: No case source base, timeline, dataset, or counter-case evidence was checked.
unresolved_risks: Real case use requires source base, comparison class, selection logic, and counter-case review.
handoff_limits: Use this fixture only to validate case-study dossier structure and handoff limits.

claim_needing_case: The chapter needs a bounded illustrative case.
case_selection_logic: Fixture case selected only to validate the artifact shape.

case_dossiers.supports: Shows how a case could be connected to a claim.
case_dossiers.challenges: Does not establish generality or causation.
case_dossiers.generalization_limit: Do not generalize beyond fixture scope.

counter_cases: Add a real counter-case before handoff.
safer_case_claims: This case can illustrate, not prove, the claim.
